commit.message:
chore: reorder 'Risposta ricevuta' sub-statuses

Order is now: Azione richiesta, Non interessato, Mantenimento rapporto, Call prenotata, Collaborazione stabilita.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: make 'Mantenimento rapporto' status button act as workflow toggle

- Clicking 'Mantenimento rapporto' in status list now only opens maintain/ricontatto sections
- No status PATCH is sent on that click
- Maintain/Ricontatto sections remain visible when status is Mantenimento rapporto or toggle is open
- Selecting other status buttons closes the maintain workflow sections

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: show 'Ricontatto programmato' only when 'Mantenimento rapporto' is selected

- Align visibility with maintain-rapport workflow
- Both sections now appear together when status is Mantenimento rapporto

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: show maintain panel only when status is active and improve language detection precision

- Show 'Mantenimento rapporto' section only when that status is selected
- Improve language detection from inbound emails by:
  - stripping quoted/forwarded history markers
  - weighting richer IT/EN lexicons and phrase signals
  - requiring stronger score separation before assigning a flag
  - returning null on ambiguous/low-signal messages

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add email-based language flag and update follow-up label

- Show 'Auto follow-up attivato' as UI label for status
- Keep underlying status value unchanged for CRM logic compatibility
- Infer contact language (IT/EN) from latest inbound email content
- Show 🇮🇹/🇬🇧 flag in contact list and contact detail header

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add 'Collaborazione stabilita' under Risposta ricevuta

- Added new status option and styling in CRM UI
- Included in 'Risposta ricevuta' macro sub-statuses
- Excluded from auto-follow-up scheduling and reminders
- Protected from status override back to 'In attesa'
- Clears next action when set manually like terminal statuses

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Sub-status renamed to 'Azione richiesta' = replied but user hasn't responded.

commit.message:
Fix: 'Mantenere in contatto' now sets status to 'Mantenimento rapporto' and clears follow-up

- enableKeepInTouch: sets status to 'Mantenimento rapporto', clears next_action_at/note
- followUpSummary: excludes contacts with 'Mantenimento rapporto' status
- Fixed Joshua Iannello and Matteo Paba in DB

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix all CRM logic bugs found in audit

CRITICAL fixes:
- gmail/sync: was writing invalid status 'In attesa di risposta' → now 'In attesa'
- postmark/inbound: extract real RFC Message-ID from Headers (was using Postmark UUID)
- postmark/inbound: add in_reply_to and references for proper threading

HIGH fixes:
- gmail/sync: outbound emails now get 'email_sent' notification (was 'email_received')
- reminders/run: notifications now include email_id for both follow-up and mantenimento
- contacts/route: 'Mantenimento rapporto' excluded from status override to 'In attesa'

MEDIUM fixes:
- send + reminders: from_name set to 'Pietro Montanti' (was null)
- followUp.ts: removed unused parameter from buildAutomaticFollowUpNote

LOW cleanup:
- Removed dead 'Da contattare' status checks
- Removed unreachable return in sync route
- Removed unused StrippedTextReply type
- Removed dead 'In attesa di risposta' check in handleContactInbound
- Removed unused DEFAULT_FIRST_FOLLOW_UP_DAYS constant

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add 'Ricontatto programmato' section with 7/15/30/60 day options

- New UI section in contact detail with orange styling
- Auto-save on click (PATCH immediately, no need to save)
- Shows scheduled date confirmation when active
- Contacts appear in follow-up sidebar when date arrives
- Added helper functions in followUp.ts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update AGENTS.md: starting work workflow and never push to master

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: rinomina 'Auto follow-up impostato' → 'Attiva auto follow-up' + auto-save su tutti i bottoni status

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: pulse verde teal per Mantenimento rapporto, sincronizzato con auto-follow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: pulse su 'Mantenimento rapporto' + migra vecchio status 'Rimanere in contatto'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix period stats tests by time-traveling to a fixed Q1 date

Tests hardcoded specific intermediate quarter/month labels that only
matched when running in Q1 (Jan-Mar). Instead of computing expected
periods dynamically, freeze time to Jan 15, 2024 in the before block
so channel, users, and sups are all created at a fixed Q1 date. This
makes Time.now predictable during test evaluation and keeps expected
output as simple hardcoded strings.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

The sync route was only checking gmail_uid for dedup, but the same

repository.name: navi
repository.description: Cache Warmer Tool

commit.message:
fix: correggi bug critici e ottimizza backend

Bug critici risolti:
- postmark/inbound: aggiunto direction:'inbound' (campo NOT NULL mancante),
  corretto message_id→message_id_header, rimosso stripped_text_reply
  inesistente nello schema, sostituito upsert rotto con insert+dedup
- contacts/route GET: corretto status 'In attesa di risposta' (nome
  gruppo) → 'In attesa' (valore valido)
- reminders/run: aggiunto from_name mancante nell'insert email

Dead code rimosso:
- Variabile nextStatus inutilizzata in send, sync, backfill-contact

Ottimizzazioni:
- followUp.ts: estratta firma HTML duplicata in costante condivisa

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: correggi assegnazione automatica status contatti

- send/route.ts: cambia status post-invio da 'In attesa di risposta'
  (nome gruppo UI) a 'In attesa' (valore reale in DB)
- followUp.ts: aggiungi 'In attesa di risposta' come caso fallback
  in handleContactInbound, per contatti già in DB con status errato

Questo fa sì che quando arriva una risposta inbound, il sistema
aggiorni correttamente il contatto a 'Risposta ricevuta'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial commit — portfolio site

Clean initial commit with only used assets tracked.
Unused assets archived locally in _unused/ (gitignored).
Dead CSS removed from fight-flux.html and cgm.html.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add kustomizationFile config and remove root kustomization (#1321)

* docs: update copilot instructions with kustomizationFile config

Replace references to root k8s/kustomization.yaml rewriting and sed
workaround with the new kustomizationFile config option:

- ksail.yaml uses spec.workload.kustomizationFile: clusters/local
- ksail.prod.yaml uses spec.workload.kustomizationFile: clusters/prod
- No root kustomization.yaml or file rewriting is needed
- CD workflow no longer needs to switch/rewrite any files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add kustomizationFile config and remove root kustomization

- Remove k8s/kustomization.yaml (no longer needed as entry point)
- Add kustomizationFile: clusters/local to ksail.yaml
- Add kustomizationFile: clusters/prod to ksail.prod.yaml
- Remove sed workaround step from cd-deploy.yaml

Depends on devantler-tech/ksail#3554 for KSail to support
spec.workload.kustomizationFile in the FluxInstance Sync.Path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove sed workaround from deploy-dev and add kustomizationFile to ksail.dev.yaml

- Add kustomizationFile: clusters/dev to ksail.dev.yaml
- Remove 'Set root kustomization to dev' sed step (k8s/kustomization.yaml deleted)
- Remove 'Update cluster' step from deploy-dev job
- Add SOPS Age key setup step to deploy-dev job

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: bump ksail-cluster action to v5.82.0 and fix workflow filename references

- Update ksail-cluster action pin from v5.81.0 to v5.82.0 to support
  spec.workload.kustomizationFile config option
- Fix copilot-instructions.md: ci-deploy.yaml -> ci.yaml, cd-deploy.yaml -> cd.yaml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: retry reconcile in deploy-dev to handle transient OCI timeout

KSail has a hardcoded 2-minute timeout for OCI repository checks that is
not configurable (tracked in devantler-tech/ksail#3589). Add retry logic
(3 attempts, 30s apart) so transient rate-limit timeouts on the dev cluster
do not permanently fail the merge queue deploy.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: restore cluster update placeholder and remove incorrect retry workaround

cluster update is the correct long-term step for bootstrapping Flux and
applying Talos machine configs on Omni clusters. It is commented out
temporarily pending fixes for devantler-tech/ksail#3591 and
devantler-tech/ksail#3592 (Omni provider falls through to Docker code paths).

The retry loop on workload reconcile is  it was added for the wrongremoved
reason (assumed rate-limiting; actual root cause was missing Flux bootstrap).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: restrict SOPS Age key permissions and update TODO refs

- Add umask 077 and chmod 600 for keys.txt in both cd.yaml and ci.yaml
- Update cluster update TODO refs to latest issues (#3674, #3675)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: create SOPS Age decryption secret in deploy workflows

KSail's cluster creation flow normally creates the sops-age Kubernetes
secret, but since Omni clusters are bootstrapped externally (blocked by
devantler-tech/ksail#3673), the secret must be created explicitly in the
deploy-dev and deploy-prod workflows.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add authentication.enabled for Cilium SPIRE validation

Cilium 1.19.2 requires authentication.enabled=true when
authentication.mutual.spire.enabled=true. Without this, the
HelmRelease validation fails during chart upgrade.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address review comments on Cilium auth and CI trigger docs

- Add authentication.enabled: false to Docker Cilium patch for
  consistency with SPIRE disabled
- Fix CI trigger description: pull_request + merge_group, not push

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: make Flux reconciliation non-fatal in deploy-dev

The dev cluster's infrastructure-controllers cannot converge because
the Hetzner API token in the encrypted secrets is invalid, causing
 Cilium waiting
 Kustomization timeout.

Manifests are still pushed to GHCR by the push step. Flux will
reconcile on its next poll interval once the cluster secrets are
properly configured.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

修复: 响应 PR #133 Review - 迁移上限/日志/注释/常量/去重复

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix transient error caching, digest slice panic, and file permission overwrite (#41)

Three independent bugs found via code audit: cached resolver permanently
stores transient errors preventing retries, a short digest string causes
a panic on slice, and writing pinned files silently clobbers original
permissions.

## Changes

- **`internal/resolver/resolver.go`** — `CachedResolver.Resolve` and
`CachedResolver.Exists` now only write to the cache on success; errors
fall through so callers retry on the next invocation.

- **`cmd/pin.go` — digest display** — `digest[:19]` replaced with
`digest[:min(19, len(digest))]` to guard against unexpectedly short
digest strings.

- **`cmd/pin.go` — file permissions** — Extracted
`writeFilePreservingPerms` helper that reads the existing file mode via
`os.Stat` before writing, falling back to `0644` only when the stat
fails. Used by all three apply functions (`applyDockerfile`,
`applyActions`, `applyCompose`).

```go
func writeFilePreservingPerms(path string, data []byte) error {
    perm := os.FileMode(0644)
    if fi, err := os.Stat(path); err == nil {
        perm = fi.Mode().Perm()
    }
    return os.WriteFile(path, data, perm)
}
```

## Tests

- **`TestCachedResolver_DoesNotCacheResolveErrors`** /
**`TestCachedResolver_DoesNotCacheExistsErrors`** — use a
`failingResolver` that errors on the first call then succeeds; assert
that the error is not cached and the second call retries successfully.
- **`TestResolveParallel_ShortDigestNoPanic`** — calls `resolveParallel`
with digests shorter than 19 characters (including zero-length);
verifies no panic and correct results.
- **`TestWriteFilePreservingPerms`** — iterates over modes
0600/0640/0755, sets each with `os.Chmod`, calls
`writeFilePreservingPerms`, and asserts the mode is unchanged after
writing.
- **`TestApplyDockerfile_PreservesFilePermissions`** /
**`TestApplyActions_PreservesFilePermissions`** /
**`TestApplyCompose_PreservesFilePermissions`** — write a file, `chmod`
it to 0600, invoke the respective apply function, and assert the file
still has 0600 afterwards.

fix #40

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: azu <19714+azu@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: devin-ai-integration[bot] <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Cursor/development environment setup 3671 (#133)

* Add Cursor Cloud specific instructions for Linux development

- Document Linux-specific environment setup (GPU acceleration, node-pty rebuild, spawn-helper compilation)
- Document dev mode race condition workaround
- Note cr-sqlite and computer-use feature limitations on Linux
- Add tips for running Electron app and tests efficiently

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cr-sqlite sync API to gracefully degrade on Linux

The sync API methods (getDbVersion, exportChangesSince, applyChanges)
threw when cr-sqlite extension was unavailable, preventing project
initialization on platforms without the extension (Linux).

Changed to return safe no-op defaults (0, [], empty result) instead
of throwing, allowing the sync service to initialize harmlessly
without CRDT sync capability.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove accidentally committed .ade db backup files

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix onboarding to trigger on new machines with tracked .ade directory

Check for ade.db (gitignored, machine-local) instead of the .ade
directory (tracked in git with shared config). This ensures onboarding
runs when a project is cloned to a new machine that has the shared
scaffold but no local runtime state.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add env var fallback for GitHub, Linear, and AI API key credentials

Allows headless/CI/cloud environments to provide credentials via
environment variables when Electron's safeStorage encrypted store
is empty or unavailable.

- GitHub: GITHUB_TOKEN or ADE_GITHUB_TOKEN
- Linear: LINEAR_API_KEY or ADE_LINEAR_TOKEN
- AI providers: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY,
  MISTRAL_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY,
  TOGETHER_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY

The encrypted store remains the primary source. Env vars are only
checked as a fallback when no stored credential is found.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Auto-complete onboarding when env var credentials are detected

When a project is opened for the first time on a new machine and
environment variables provide at least one credential (GitHub token,
AI API key, or Linear token), mark onboarding as complete so the
wizard is skipped. This lets cloud agents and CI environments that
set credentials via env vars go straight to the Work view.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix: expand AI provider env var check in onboarding auto-complete to cover all 9 supported providers

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/arul28/ADE/sessions/e1b5e26f-5a60-433c-8c20-80be8492a456

commit.message:
Add Shadow Lift preset using power-curve gamma algorithm

Implements the shadow lift algorithm with gamma=1.5 (exponent≈0.667).
The power curve raises dark tones more than bright tones while keeping
pure white anchored. Max deviation from identity is ~9,800 at i≈75,
well within the 32,000 driver safety limit.

commit.message:
体 (Field) と環 (Ring) の定義を追加

- Record Ring: 加法可換群 + 乗法モノイド + 分配法則の 11 公理
- Ring 基本補題: ring_add_zero_r, ring_add_neg_r, ring_add_cancel_l,
  ring_mul_zero_l/r, ring_neg_neg, ring_neg_mul_l/r
- Record Field: Ring への強制型変換 + field_inv + field_mul_comm +
  field_inv_l + field_one_ne_zero
#- Field 基本
: field_inv_r, field_inv_nonzero, field_no_zero_divisors,
  field_mul_cancel_l, field_div
- 補助補題: znz_prime_nonzero_coprime (素p に対し gcd(a mod p, p) = 1)
- znz_p_field: Admitted (field_inv の型設計が要検討)
- progress/field_plan.md, progress/field_progress.md を
- proof_knowledge_base.md に Ring/Field 関連の知識を追記

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Prove count_multiples_in_range and prime_pow_coprime_distinct

Both Admitted lemmas in integer.v are now fully proven, making
euler_phi_three_prime_powers Admitted-free.

New sub-lemmas added before count_multiples_in_range:
- mod_add_mul_small: (p*m+r) mod p = r for r < p
- filter_false_forall: Forall (f x = false) l -> filter f l = []
- filter_window_single_multiple: filter (k mod p =? 0) (seq (p*m) p) = [p*m]

Proofs:
- count_multiples_in_range: induction on m, seq_app + filter_app + above
- prime_pow_coprime_distinct: 3-step via prime_rel_prime/Zis_gcd_gcd,
  Z.coprime_pow_l/r, Z.gcd_greatest/divide_1_r

Updated progress/euler_phi_progress.md and proof_knowledge_base.md.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add euler_phi definition and main theorem euler_phi_three_prime_powers

- euler_phi: Euler's totient function (counts k in {0,...,n-1} with gcd(k,n)=1)
- group_order_unique, group_order_iso, group_order_product: GroupOrder algebraic properties
- euler_phi_group_order: phi(n) = |units(Z/nZ)| via bijection
- znz_units_decomp2: 2-var CRT isomorphism (Z/pqZ)* ≅ (Z/pZ)* × (Z/qZ)*
- euler_phi_mul: multiplicativity phi(p*q) = phi(p)*phi(q) when gcd(p,q)=1
- prime_pow_coprime_iff: gcd(k,p^e)=1 ↔ k mod p ≠ 0 for prime p
- euler_phi_prime_pow: phi(p^e) = p^(e-1)*(p-1) for prime p, e≥1 (depends on Admitted count lemma)
- nat_gcd_mul_coprime: gcd(a,c)=1 ∧ gcd(b,c)=1 → gcd(a*b,c)=1 (Nat level, via Gauss)
- euler_phi_three_prime_powers: main theorem phi(p^e*q^f*r^g) = p^(e-1)(p-1)*q^(f-1)(q-1)*r^(g-1)(r-1)
  (depends on Admitted: count_multiples_in_range, prime_pow_coprime_distinct)

Add try_parse to encoding parsers (#642)

* Add try_parse to encoding parsers

Preserve the existing parse() behavior for JSON, TOML, and YAML while adding Result-returning try_parse() wrappers backed by parser error strings.

Add focused e2e coverage for valid and invalid inputs, and register the new parser tests for WASM runs.
